text.title: image-generation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for image-generation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Text rendering in images is unreliable for strings longer than 25 characters even with GPT-4o/DALL-E 3.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Never use image generation for text-heavy content. If text is required, use DALL-E 3 and keep text under 25 characters.

failure-mode.description: Consistent character appearance across a series requires seeds (SD) or reference image support (Flux Kontext).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Standard API calls produce visually different people each time. Plan for this in character-driven content pipelines.

failure-mode.description: DALL-E 3's `revised_prompt` silently modifies your prompt for safety.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The generated image may not match the input prompt; log `revised_prompt` for debugging and base quality checks on the actual revised prompt.

failure-mode.description: Content policy rejections are unpredictable on borderline prompts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Implement retry with softened prompt and exponential backoff.

failure-mode.description: Aspect ratio must match intended use case at generation time.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Upscaling or cropping after the fact degrades quality significantly.

failure-mode.description: Storing OpenAI image URLs without immediately downloading the image.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Image URLs from the OpenAI API expire after 1 hour. An agent that logs the URL for later retrieval will receive a 404 when the pipeline processes it.

failure-mode.description: Asserting the generated image matches the input prompt without checking `revised_prompt`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: DALL-E 3 silently modifies prompts for safety. The `revised_prompt` field shows what was actually generated; quality checks must be based on this, not the original prompt.

failure-mode.description: Submitting batch generation jobs without rate limit throttling.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: DALL-E 3 is rate-limited to 5 images/minute on Tier 1. Agent batch jobs without throttling exhaust the rate limit in the first batch and stall all subsequent requests.
